visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She wears a striped sun hat, a black dress with lace detailing, and a black choker. She smiles broadly while holding two round plastic tubs of green cream cheese spread. Behind her, rows of shopping carts and refrigerated shelves filled with products are visible. (2) The scene transitions to a home interior. Two women are seated at a table. The woman from the previous scene, now wearing a dark beret, is on the right. Another woman with long dark hair in a black and white dress is on the left. They hold a tub of the same green spread and a plate of pasta, gesturing with forks while talking excitedly to the camera. (3) The women continue to eat the pasta, showing close-ups of the noodles coated in green sauce. The lighting is warm and domestic, with kitchen appliances and home decor blurred in the background as they enthusiastically recommend the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 239元. [Subtitle]: 青醬蒜香乳酪抹醬. [Slogan]: 隱藏吃法. (2) [Subtitle]: 聽說這個醬 非常厲害. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們還有隱藏吃法. (4) [Subtitle]: 除了在麵包跟餅乾上. (5) [Subtitle]: 我們回去試給大家看. (6) [Slogan]: 好市多新品. [Subtitle]: 青醬蒜香乳酪. (7) [Variety]: 超級無敵推薦. (8) [Subtitle]: 因為它的青醬. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的那個羅勒的香味. (10) [Subtitle]: 跟它蒜頭的香味. (11) [Subtitle]: 都非常的突出. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且它的蒜頭呢. (13) [Subtitle]: 是吃得到一點那種. (14) [Variety]: 蒜頭辛辣感!!. (15) [Subtitle]: 還有蒜顆粒那種感覺. (16) [Subtitle]: 超級無敵過癮. (17) [Subtitle]: 拿來沾麵包 可頌 吐司 都超好吃以外. (18) [Slogan]: 還有隱藏吃法. (19) [Subtitle]: 直接做成超好吃的. (20) [Subtitle]: 青醬乳酪義大利麵. (21) [Subtitle]: 想知道做法的話. (22) [Subtitle]: 要記得看我們的YouTube影片哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host in the first scene; a second female companion joins in the second indoor scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Host 1: Striped hat, black lace dress, black choker. Host 2: Long dark hair, black and white layered dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse aisle with industrial shelving and shopping carts. Second scene is a modern home dining area with a kitchen counter and shelving in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins immediately over an upbeat electronic pop BGM. She speaks at a fast pace with a bright, rising intonation to introduce the Costco spread. (2) A digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as promotional text appears. A second female voice joins, providing a slightly lower-pitched but equally enthusiastic description of the garlic texture. (3) The rhythmic percussion of the music stays constant as the hosts discuss cooking pasta. Clinking sounds of cutlery on a plate are audible. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic call to action to visit their YouTube channel, ending with a sharp digital stinger SFX.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a new Costco pesto cream cheese spread and demonstrate its versatility by showing it used in a pasta dish, ultimately driving traffic to the creator's YouTube channel for the full recipe.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video specifically highlights a Costco product, shows the price, and provides a favorable review and usage suggestion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media food review using colorful overlays and fast-paced editing to maintain engagement.
